summary: Auth flow rewrite testing completed. All features working correctly after fixing admin login bug in frontend.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/otp/send - sends OTP (demo: 1234)
Backend: POST /api/auth/otp/verify - verifies OTP correctly
Backend: POST /api/auth/otp/complete-signup - creates user with password
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - accepts phone + password
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - accepts email for admin login
Backend: POST /api/auth/password/send-otp - sends reset OTP
Backend: POST /api/auth/password/reset - resets password with OTP
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns current user
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout - clears session
Frontend: Signup method selection shows OTP and Google options
Frontend: Signup step 1 - Name + Phone form with Send OTP button
Frontend: Signup step 2 - OTP input with verify button
Frontend: Signup step 3 - Password input with complete button
Frontend: Signup redirects to dashboard after completion
Frontend: Step indicator bar shows 3 steps with progress
Frontend: Back button works in all signup steps
Frontend: Login with phone + password works
Frontend: Admin login with email in phone field works (FIXED)
Frontend: Forgot password link opens reset flow
Frontend: Password reset step 1 - Phone input
Frontend: Password reset step 2 - OTP verification
Frontend: Password reset step 3 - New password
Frontend: Password reset shows success toast and returns to login
Frontend: Back button works in all password reset steps
Frontend: Google login button present on both signup and login pages

bugs_fixed.issue: Admin login with email was not working - phone input stripped all non-digit characters
bugs_fixed.fix: Modified phone input to allow email addresses (contains @) while still validating phone numbers

critical_code_review_comments: OTP is MOCKED - always returns 1234 (demo mode, no real SMS)
Backend correctly handles both phone and email in login endpoint
Frontend now allows email input for admin login backward compatibility
All data-testid attributes present for auth UI elements
Step indicators correctly show progress in both signup and password reset flows
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing via OTP signup flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow rewrite fully tested. Signup has 3 steps: form(name+phone)->otp->password. Login accepts phone+password OR email+password (for admin). Password reset has 3 steps: phone->otp->new_password. OTP is MOCKED to always be 1234. Frontend LoginPage.js was fixed to allow email input for admin login. All data-testid attributes: signup-otp-option, signup-google-option, otp-name-input, otp-phone-input, send-otp-button, otp-code-input, verify-otp-button, signup-password-input, complete-signup-button, signup-back-button, login-phone-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, forgot-password-link, google-login-button, forgot-phone-input, forgot-send-otp-button, forgot-otp-input, forgot-verify-otp-button, forgot-new-password-input, forgot-reset-button, forgot-back-button.
